# Armor & Shields {#sec-chapter-armor-shields}

Armor reduces damage. Shields block actively.

| Armor | Discipline | DR | Stealth |
|-------|-----------|-----|---------|
| Padded | — | −1 | — |
| Leather | — | −2 | — |
| Studded Leather | 1 Armor | −2 | — |
| Chain Shirt | 1 Armor | −3 | Disadv |
| Breastplate | 2 Armor | −4 | — |
| Half Plate | 2 Armor | −4 | Disadv |
| Chain Mail | 2 Armor | −5 | Disadv |
| Plate | 3 Armor | −6 | Disadv |

## Shields

**Buckler:** 1 Protection, +1 DR.

**Shield:** 1 Protection, +2 DR.

**Tower Shield:** 2 Protection, +3 DR, half cover.

### Shield Block (Reaction)

When you are hit by an attack, you may use your reaction to interpose your shield. Reduce the damage tier by one step: **Strong → Standard, Standard → Weak, Weak → 1 damage.** You must be wielding a shield and be aware of the attack.

### Shield Block (Reaction)

When you are hit by an attack, you may use your reaction to interpose your shield. Reduce the damage tier by one step: **Strong → Standard, Standard → Weak, Weak → 1 damage.** You must be wielding a shield and be aware of the attack.

Shield Block cannot reduce damage below 1. It can be used against melee attacks, ranged attacks, and spell attacks — anything you can see coming.

> **DA Guidance:** Let the player declare Shield Block after hearing the damage tier result, not before. This makes shields feel active and tactical rather than just a passive DR bonus.

## Donning & Doffing

Light armor: 1 minute. Medium: 5 minutes. Heavy: 10 minutes. Shield: 1 action.
